title: ervilia lunata subsp. grandiflora
intro: Ervilia lunata subsp. grandiflora, also known as the "large-flowered ervilia", is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is commonly used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of ervilia lunata subsp. grandiflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
